## Problem

<!-- Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the limitation you are hitting.

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you would like to see.
     Be as specific as possible - include example commands, output, or behavior. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you tried working around this? Are there other approaches that could solve the problem? -->

## Relevant Phase

<!-- Which EvePilot phase does this relate to? (Phase 1-6 from the README, or a new idea) -->

- [ ] Phase 1 - EVE-NG API Discovery
- [ ] Phase 2 - Console Bootstrap
- [ ] Phase 3 - Lab Lifecycle Automation
- [ ] Phase 4 - CI/CD Integration
- [ ] Phase 5 - Monitoring and Observability
- [ ] Phase 6 - Lab Generation and UI
- [ ] New / Other
